ledger_ashby.name: Repair Ledger
ledger_ashby.description: Several withdrawals against the repair fund, and a stack of numbered receipt stubs.

satchel_voss.name: Burnt Satchel
satchel_voss.description: A worn leather satchel that someone has attempted to burn. Torn, partially burned, slips of paper are scattered inside.

manifests_kestrel.name: Shipping Manifests
manifests_kestrel.description: A hefty stack of dock paperwork.

blueprint_marrow.name: Blueprint Tube
blueprint_marrow.description: The original contracted repairs, and a second sheet showing everything that actually got built.

letter_ashgate.name: Torn Paperwork
letter_ashgate.description: An important-looking letter torn into pieces, mixed in with various other poorly shredded papers.

rota_reyes.name: Patrol Rota
rota_reyes.description: A watch schedule. A half-torn note about a shift swap is stapled to the top.

diary_maid.name: Hidden Diary
diary_maid.description: Half plain hand, half a lover's code. Someone was being overly careful.
